basic_details.job_title: NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 102 Posts
basic_details.short_information: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: NMDC Steel Limited (NSL), a Government Company under the administrative control of the Ministry of Steel, Government of India, has released the notification for recruitment to the post of Executive Trainee across 10 disciplines. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online for a total of 102 Executive Trainee vacancies in disciplines including Mechanical, Electrical, Civil, Chemical, Metallurgy, Finance, Human Resources, and others.

application_fee.sc_fee: Exempted (proof of exemption must be attached)
application_fee.details: Payment can be made using UPI/Credit Card/Online Net Banking through SBI-Collect, integrated with the online application. Transaction charges, if any, will be borne by the candidate. On successful transaction, an application form with Unique Transaction Number and Application Number will be generated, which should be printed for record. For a failed transaction, the amount will be automatically refunded to the same account within 10 working days. Application fee once paid will not be refunded or adjusted against any future notification in case of cancellation of the notification for which the fee was paid.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 27 years as on last date of online application (11.08.2026)
age_limit.details: The upper age limit is 27 years as on the last date of online application (11.08.2026). Age relaxation is admissible as follows:

qualification.education_qualification: Discipline-specific engineering/professional degree (varies by discipline — see Eligibility section)
qualification.details: The minimum percentage of marks in the qualifying graduate/post-graduate degree/diploma courses shall be 60% aggregate for General candidates against Un-Reserved (UR), EWS, and OBC category. For candidates belonging to SC/ST/PwD category, the minimum percentage of marks in the respective Degree/PG Degree/PG Diploma shall be 50%. For Departmental candidates belonging to SC/ST/PwD category, the minimum percentage of marks shall be 45%. For Departmental candidates belonging to Un-Reserved category and OBC, the minimum percentage of marks shall be 55%. Candidates studying in the final year are also eligible to apply, but must pass the qualifying examination before GD & Interview and produce the final pass certificate at the time of GD & Interview; otherwise, their candidature will not be considered.

vacancy_details.Minimum Essential Qualification: Degree in Engineering in Computer & Information Technology/Computer Science/Information Science, or M.C.A., or B.E./B.Tech. (Computer/CS/IT), or PG Diploma in Computer Application Programming/Computer Management/Systems Management (two years duration)
(i) Graduation (ii) CA/ICWA or Engineering Graduate with MBA (Fin.)
i. Graduation ii. PG Degree/PG Diploma in Sociology/Social Work/Labour Welfare/Personnel Management/IR/IRPM/HR/HRM, or MBA (Personnel Management/HR/HRM), minimum two years duration
Degree in Instrumentation Engineering/Electronics & Communication Engineering/Electrical Engineering/Electrical & Electronics Engineering

salary_details.pay_scale: Training: Basic Pay Rs. 50,000 + IDA (6 months); Post-training: Assistant Manager scale Rs. 60,000-1,80,000, initial Basic Pay Rs. 60,000/month
salary_details.details: Executive Trainees will undergo training for 6 months initially and will be offered a Basic Pay of Rs. 50,000/- plus Dearness Allowance (IDA) as per Company rules. On successful completion of training, Executive Trainees will be designated as Assistant Managers in the scale pay of Rs. 60,000-1,80,000/-, with initial Basic Pay fixed at Rs. 60,000/- per month. | On successful completion of training, they will be entitled to Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance, perquisites under the Cafeteria Approach, PF, Gratuity, PRP, and other allowances and benefits as applicable under NSL rules. Being direct recruitment, the Company will not bear any liability on account of salary/leave salary/pension contribution of previous employment, if any.

selection_process: CBT (Computer Based Test) in concerned discipline 70%
Candidates will be required to appear for a Computer Based Test (CBT) consisting of Multiple-Choice Questions at centres decided by the Management. Based on the CBT score and requirement
The CBT will be conducted in Hindi & English and will consist of objective-type multiple-choice questions. Minimum qualifying marks in CBT to be considered for GD & Interview: 40 marks for SC/ST/PwBD
Candidates will be called for GD & Interview based on CBT marks
in the ratio of 1:3. Where two or more candidates in the same discipline and category secure equal marks in CBT and the 1:3 ratio is exceeded

all candidates with equal marks will be called for GD & Interview irrespective of the ratio. Topics for Group Discussion will be decided in advance by the GD Committee and may be discipline-specific or general; GDs will be held discipline-wise and category-wise in batches.
Candidates called for GD & Interview must produce original documents/testimonials along with self-attested photocopies in support of age
how_to_apply: Visit the NMDC Steel Limited Careers page: https://www.nsltd.in/en/careers
The application link will be available from 10:00 AM on 22.07.2026 to 11:45 PM on 11.08.2026.
Fill all details online and upload the relevant documents/certificates as listed above.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 500/- (if applicable) through UPI/Credit Card/Net Banking via SBI-Collect.
On successful transaction, note the Unique Transaction Number and Application Number generated.
Download and print the hard copy of the filled-in application form for your records.
Submit only one application; in case of multiple applications, the latest one shall be considered final and older applications shall be rejected.
Helpline email [email protected] is available between 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM on all working days to assist with technical aspects of the online application.
important_instructions: Candidates looking for more opportunities in the PSU sector can also explore the latest PSU Government Jobs across various organizations. Applicants searching for high-paying technical openings can check Mechanical Engineering Jobs, Electrical Engineering Jobs, and Government Jobs for Engineers for upcoming vacancies. Those holding engineering or professional qualifications can also browse more Executive Trainee Jobs and Central Government Jobs matching their eligibility.

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Notification
content_sections.text: NMDC Steel Limited (NSL) is a Govt. Company under the administrative control of the Ministry of Steel, Govt. of India, with shares listed on BSE, NSE, and the Calcutta Stock Exchange. The Company owns and operates the state-of-the-art 3.0 MTPA steel plant at Nagarnar, Chhattisgarh, built at a cost of approximately ₹24,000 crores. NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Apply Online for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026

rows.details: Training: Basic Pay Rs. 50,000 + IDA (6 months); Post-training: Assistant Manager scale Rs. 60,000-1,80,000, initial Basic Pay Rs. 60,000/month
Discipline-specific engineering/professional degree (varies by discipline — see Eligibility section)
Maximum 27 years as on last date of online application (11.08.2026)

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Important Dates

rows.event: Cut-off Date for Eligibility (Age, Qualification etc.)

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details (Discipline-wise)
content_sections.text: All qualifications should be from Universities/Institutions recognized by UGC/AICTE/Government of India. Candidates who have completed their engineering degree or professional qualifications can also explore more Graduate Government Jobs and Engineering Government Jobs available across India.

rows.minimum_essential_qualification: Degree in Engineering in Computer & Information Technology/Computer Science/Information Science, or M.C.A., or B.E./B.Tech. (Computer/CS/IT), or PG Diploma in Computer Application Programming/Computer Management/Systems Management (two years duration)
(i) Graduation (ii) CA/ICWA or Engineering Graduate with MBA (Fin.)
i. Graduation ii. PG Degree/PG Diploma in Sociology/Social Work/Labour Welfare/Personnel Management/IR/IRPM/HR/HRM, or MBA (Personnel Management/HR/HRM), minimum two years duration
Degree in Instrumentation Engineering/Electronics & Communication Engineering/Electrical Engineering/Electrical & Electronics Engineering

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Category-wise Vacancy & Reservation
content_sections.text: The number of vacancies indicated above is tentative and may vary depending upon requirement. Reservation of posts for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD)/Ex-Servicemen will be as per Government of India directives.

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The minimum percentage of marks in the qualifying graduate/post-graduate degree/diploma courses shall be 60% aggregate for General candidates against Un-Reserved (UR), EWS, and OBC category. For candidates belonging to SC/ST/PwD category, the minimum percentage of marks in the respective Degree/PG Degree/PG Diploma shall be 50%. For Departmental candidates belonging to SC/ST/PwD category, the minimum percentage of marks shall be 45%. For Departmental candidates belonging to Un-Reserved category and OBC, the minimum percentage of marks shall be 55%. Candidates studying in the final year are also eligible to apply, but must pass the qualifying examination before GD & Interview and produce the final pass certificate at the time of GD & Interview; otherwise, their candidature will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The upper age limit is 27 years as on the last date of online application (11.08.2026). Age relaxation is admissible as follows:

rows.age_relaxation: As per Government of India Guidelines

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Emoluments
content_sections.text: Executive Trainees will undergo training for 6 months initially and will be offered a Basic Pay of Rs. 50,000/- plus Dearness Allowance (IDA) as per Company rules. On successful completion of training, Executive Trainees will be designated as Assistant Managers in the scale pay of Rs. 60,000-1,80,000/-, with initial Basic Pay fixed at Rs. 60,000/- per month. On successful completion of training, they will be entitled to Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance, perquisites under the Cafeteria Approach, PF, Gratuity, PRP, and other allowances and benefits as applicable under NSL rules. Being direct recruitment, the Company will not bear any liability on account of salary/leave salary/pension contribution of previous employment, if any.

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Payment can be made using UPI/Credit Card/Online Net Banking through SBI-Collect, integrated with the online application. Transaction charges, if any, will be borne by the candidate. On successful transaction, an application form with Unique Transaction Number and Application Number will be generated, which should be printed for record. For a failed transaction, the amount will be automatically refunded to the same account within 10 working days. Application fee once paid will not be refunded or adjusted against any future notification in case of cancellation of the notification for which the fee was paid.

rows.application_fee: Exempted (proof of exemption must be attached)

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates will be required to appear for a Computer Based Test (CBT) consisting of Multiple-Choice Questions at centres decided by the Management. Based on the CBT score and requirement, candidates will be shortlisted discipline-wise, category-wise for Group Discussion (GD) & Interview. The CBT will be conducted in Hindi & English and will consist of objective-type multiple-choice questions. Minimum qualifying marks in CBT to be considered for GD & Interview: 40 marks for SC/ST/PwBD, 45 marks for OBC-NCL, and 50 marks for UR/EWS category. Candidates will be called for GD & Interview based on CBT marks, discipline-wise and category-wise, in the ratio of 1:3. Where two or more candidates in the same discipline and category secure equal marks in CBT and the 1:3 ratio is exceeded, all candidates with equal marks will be called for GD & Interview irrespective of the ratio. Topics for Group Discussion will be decided in advance by the GD Committee and may be discipline-specific or general; GDs will be held discipline-wise and category-wise in batches. Candidates called for GD & Interview must produce original documents/testimonials along with self-attested photocopies in support of age, qualification, category, etc. for verification of eligibility.

rows.component: CBT (Computer Based Test) in concerned discipline

content_sections.heading: NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026: Health & Placement
content_sections.text: Before joining, candidates must undergo a Pre-Employment Medical Examination by NSL's recognized hospital(s); the decision of NSL Management will be final and binding, and no relaxation in health standards is allowed. Selected candidates will be posted at NMDC Steel Ltd, Nagarnar, Chhattisgarh, and may be assigned job/function/assignments as per the business requirement of the Company, at any stage during their service.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Recent passport size photograph Matriculation/10th certificate Certificates in support of qualification Caste/Category Certificate — SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/EWS/Disability/Ex-Serviceman Certificate, as applicable Scanned signature Mobile number and valid email ID Candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/EWS/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen category should enclose a copy of the caste/disablement certificate in the prescribed proforma specified by the Government of India (Proforma-I for SC/ST, Proforma-II for OBC, both given as Annexures in the notification). The OBC(NCL) certificate should not be older than 6 months as on the last date of application. EWS candidates must submit an Income & Asset Certificate valid for 2026-2027 (format given as Annexure-IV). Category (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS/PwBD) once filled in the application form will not be changed, and no benefit of another category will be admissible later.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NMDC Steel Limited Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the NMDC Steel Limited Careers page: https://www.nsltd.in/en/careers The application link will be available from 10:00 AM on 22.07.2026 to 11:45 PM on 11.08.2026. Fill all details online and upload the relevant documents/certificates as listed above. Pay the application fee of Rs. 500/- (if applicable) through UPI/Credit Card/Net Banking via SBI-Collect. On successful transaction, note the Unique Transaction Number and Application Number generated. Download and print the hard copy of the filled-in application form for your records. Submit only one application; in case of multiple applications, the latest one shall be considered final and older applications shall be rejected. Helpline email [email protected] is available between 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM on all working days to assist with technical aspects of the online application.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates looking for more opportunities in the PSU sector can also explore the latest PSU Government Jobs across various organizations. Applicants searching for high-paying technical openings can check Mechanical Engineering Jobs, Electrical Engineering Jobs, and Government Jobs for Engineers for upcoming vacancies. Those holding engineering or professional qualifications can also browse more Executive Trainee Jobs and Central Government Jobs matching their eligibility.

faq.question: Q1. How many Executive Trainee vacancies has NMDC Steel Limited announced in 2026?
faq.answer: NMDC Steel Limited has announced 102 Executive Trainee vacancies under Employment Notification No. 05/2026, across 10 disciplines including Mechanical (51), Electrical (22), Finance (7), Chemical (4), Computer & IT (4), Civil (3), Ceramics (3), Human Resources (3), Metallurgy (3), and Instrumentation (2).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application link is active from 22 July 2026 (10:00 AM) to 11 August 2026 (11:45 PM), which is also the last date for applying online.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 27 years as on the last date of online application (11.08.2026), with relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer), as per Government guidelines for PwBD/Ex-Servicemen, and 10 years for Departmental (NSL) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- (non-refundable) for General/UR/OBC/EWS candidates. SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen and Departmental candidates are exempted from the fee, subject to producing proof of exemption.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Computer Based Test (CBT), followed by Group Discussion (GD) and Interview for shortlisted candidates. The final merit is based on a weightage of 70% for CBT, 15% for GD, and 15% for Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee post?
faq.answer: During the 6-month training period, Executive Trainees receive a Basic Pay of Rs. 50,000/- plus Dearness Allowance (IDA). On successful completion of training, they are designated Assistant Managers with a scale pay of Rs. 60,000-1,80,000/- and an initial Basic Pay of Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What are the minimum qualifying marks in CBT for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifying marks in CBT to be considered for GD & Interview are 40 marks for SC/ST/PwBD candidates, 45 marks for OBC-NCL candidates, and 50 marks for UR/EWS candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where will selected NMDC Steel Executive Trainees be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be posted at NMDC Steel Ltd, Nagarnar, Chhattisgarh, and may be assigned to any job/function/assignment as per the business requirement of the Company.

faq.question: Q9. Is Travelling Allowance provided for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee GD & Interview?
faq.answer: Yes, outstation candidates attending GD & Interview are reimbursed Travelling Allowance of second A/C Two Tier Rail/Bus fare by the shortest route, on production of tickets, as per the proforma at Annexure-I.

faq.question: Q10. How can candidates apply online for NMDC Steel Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must visit https://www.nsltd.in/en/careers, fill in all details online, upload the required documents (photograph, 10th certificate, qualification certificates, category certificate, scanned signature), pay the applicable fee, and submit before the closing date of 11 August 2026.
